faq.question: Will AI content get penalized by Google Search?
faq.answer: No. Google's official guidance states they reward high-quality content regardless of how it is produced. Focus on providing unique data, expert perspectives, and clear value (EEAT).

faq.question: Which AI models are best for blogging?
faq.answer: For structured drafting and deep research, Gemini-3.5-Flash and Claude-3.5-Sonnet offer the best balance of context, technical precision, and human-like expression.
